headline: Wipro Limited (WIT) Gains Due to Share Buyback Program and ServiceNow Partnership
summary: Wipro Limited (NYSE:WIT) is one of the Best Undervalued Stocks to Buy Under $5. Wipro Limited (NYSE:WIT) has gained more than 16% over the past 30 days, mainly driven by the INR 15,000 crore share buyback program and the expansion of the company’s partnership with ServiceNow. ​Recently, on May 29, Reuters reported that the stock […]

headline: Here’s Why ServiceNow Inc (NOW) is a Buy and High Growth Large Cap Stock to Invest In
summary: ServiceNow Inc. (NYSE:NOW) is one of the high-growth large-cap stocks to invest in now. On June 15, Benchmark reiterated its Buy rating on ServiceNow Inc. (NYSE:NOW) and raised the price target to $130 from $125, implying significant upside potential. headline: ServiceNow: Expect Shares To Keep Trading Lower
summary: ServiceNow (NOW) outlook: slowing cRPO growth, margin pressure, and limited AI monetization may drive further downside. See more here.
